mapper.select: SELECT id, mat_code, mat_name, mat_type, stock_qty, unit FROM materials ORDER BY mat_code ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO materials ( id, mat_code, mat_name, mat_type, stock_qty, unit ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{matCode}, #{matName}, #{matType}, #{stockQty}, #{unit} )
mapper.update: UPDATE materials SET mat_code = #{matCode}, mat_name = #{matName}, mat_type = #{matType}, stock_qty = #{stockQty}, unit = #{unit} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.product_code, b.material_id, m.mat_code, m.mat_name, m.mat_type, b.qty_per_unit, b.unit FROM bom b LEFT JOIN materials m ON m.id = b.material_id WHERE b.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bom ( id, product_code, material_id, qty_per_unit, unit ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{productCode}, #{materialId}, #{qtyPerUnit}, #{unit} )
